final:
module top_module(
  input [3:0] a,
  input [3:0] b,
  output reg [3:0] sum
);always @(*) begin
    sum = a + b;
    if(sum > 15) begin
      sum = sum - 16;
    end
  end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      sum = a - b; if(sum < 0) begin sum = sum + 16; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: sum = a - b; if(sum < 0) begin sum = sum + 16; end
